title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.1475 - Data breach, procedures
text:
162.1475.  Data breach, procedures. — 1.  "Personal information" shall have the same meaning as defined in section 407.1500.
  2.  In the event of a breach of data maintained in electronic form that includes personal information of a student, a school district shall send written notification to the parent or legal guardian of an affected student.
  3.  Notification of a breach of personal information of a student shall also be sent to the department of elementary and secondary education and the state auditor.
(L. 2018 H.B. 1606)
